covered_sentences: "Please, Catherine," he began, but then his cough interrupted him.
"Don't! Don't be angry with me! It is not my fault if I betray you.
It is because I have no choice.
He began coughing again and leaned upon her arm.

covered_sentences: Please take me back to Wuthering Heights!
"Linton, you know my father has forbidden me to go to Wuthering Heights.
We must call a servant to take you home."

covered_sentences: "There is no one in the house except my father, and I am so afraid of him," sobbed Linton.
"Please, Catherine, just help me back to the house."
Catherine agreed and walked to Wuthering Heights.
With her arm around Linton's waist.

covered_sentences: When we reached the door, she tried to move away from him, but he grasped her arm and said, "Take me into the sitting room to my chair, please, Catherine.
I will fall over if I try to walk alone."
Just then Heathcliff appeared from behind the house and grasped my arm.
"Come on, Nelly, into the house," he said.
